entry.title: Re: FB03 How to get all attachments on header level?
entry.content:
I'd say that hundreds of people did it and asked the question in the forum. Many answers were given.

NB: why tagging SAP BTP with FB03?

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: Hello, you can define a stock transfer special procurement type at MRP Area level, so that MRP creates stock transfer reservations to move the stock from the plant to the MRP Area in case of shortages. The process of moving batches close to the expiration to production would be manual.

entry.title: Re: Modeling a basic Hierarchy with Directory in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Yeah dont know why this is happening, I did do the above thing that you suggested (label semantics to the HIERARCHY_LABEL)

 

I redid the whole scenario again but its still happening.

entry.title: Changing field value for "Assigned To" in Work Order Operation in SAP Service and Asset Manager
entry.content:
Hello All,

Is there any other configuration that needs to be checked that will allow me to change the "assigned to" value in the work order? 

Config. in backend

SSAM operation page/screen

Upon click on edit (pen) icon

As you can see I do not get the field in the edit to update the "Assigned To" field.

 

Any help on this is much appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Analyse your data live with SAP Analytics Cloud on top of SAP BW/4HANA, SAP S/4HANA & SAP Da
entry.content:
I miss, above all, the interaction of JustAsk with SAP Joule and, above all, when the support of JustAsk for Live Connections will come. Furthermore, an integration of SAP Analytics Cloud in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard would also be worth mentioning. In particular, the interaction of the various AI-SAC initiatives in a central SAP Joule client integrated in Work Zone. 

All in all, a good overview/summary of the advantages and highlights of the Live Connection.

entry.title: Re: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectP
entry.content: How exactly are you adding the progressive indicator?

entry.title: Italy - XML eDocument attachment
entry.content:
How to attach pdf, .xlsx attachments in the XML? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Italy - XML eDocument attachment
entry.content:
Use the BADI 'Attachments to the XML File' to add attachments to the XML file of the eDocument and supports attachments with format Base64 and converts them to x String. 

Refer to the help portal below - APP Extensibility: eDocument Cockpit and Manage Electronic Documents | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano 

I'm Dimitris and i really like to join that journey.

I know that the deadline passed but i finished my training on point, when i tried to leave a commnet here my access was still restricted.

I've seen an email for you and i came back to grab my chance!

Regards,

Dimitris

entry.title: Re: How to handle x-www-form-urlencoded Content-Type header in SAP PI
entry.content: Please check this https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/fetch-oauth-token-in-rest-is-now-out-of-the-box/bc-p/13389660. From what I understand, there isn't seem any restriction with getting the token so I guess you just need to properly configure the REST receiver channel.

entry.title: SAP Partner Delivery Manager Newsletter November 2024 - GROW with SAP
entry.content:
Note:  Links may require access to SAP PartnerEdge or Learning Hub

SAP S/4HANA Cloud - Public Edition                                                                                                                                                                             

Top Highlights

Overview

       Register/Access

 

 

 

 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization as a Self-Service Training

In the Localization as a Self-Service training will help on our Partners enablement through a training, in this classroom Localization as a self-service methodology and extensibility will be explained together with options to cover country specific requirements.

 

        Register

  • Onsite Session : 19th November 2024, Barcelona

 

Webinar: GROW with SAP partner delivery readiness

Join us on November 12 for the GROW with SAP Partner Delivery Readiness session in our Tuesday Jump-In series, supporting SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations. Topics include enablement resources, delivery maturity metrics, and project support, with live Q&A. Perfect for partners implementing GROW with SAP

        Register

  • Session 1: 12th November 2024, 8:00 AM - 9:00 AM Europe/London
  • Session 2: 12th November 2024, 4:00 PM - 5:00 PM Europe/London

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Expertise Services

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Expertise Services is a global team of 18 experts focused on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition. Leveraging their extensive SAP network, they provide content and webinars on implementation essentials, fundamental series, and other key topics. Information on these events is available on their partner community site. The team aims to enhance partner expertise, drive cloud adoption, and support the full customer lifecycle, including integration with Ariba, SFSF, and Concur. Partners are encouraged to explore their offerings, register for events, and engage with the experts for success.

            Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

  
       

Events and Webinars for Partners

Overview

    Register/Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Essentials for Manufacturing

Welcome to the Implementation Essentials event on Manufacturing, hosted by Expertise Services. This 2-day, 2-hour-per-day session is designed for partner project teams working on or preparing for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations. Attendees will get an overview of Manufacturing components, explore SAP Best Practices and configurations, and learn about integration and extensibility for Manufacturing projects.

Prerequisites: basic SAP Activate and Manufacturing knowledge.

 

 

        Register

  • Session 1: 11th November 2024, 09:30 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 12th November 2024, 9:30 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam

 

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Implementation Essentials for Professional Services

Join us for the Implementation Essentials event on Professional Services, supporting teams working on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects. This 2-day, 2.5-hour-per-day session covers end-to-end process essentials, org structure, scope items, cross-topics, and expert insights.

        Register

  • Session 1: 13th November 2024, 9:00 AM TO 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 14th November 2024, 9:00 AM TO 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam

 

 

Webinar: SAP Integrated Business Planning for Supply Chain – the upsell opportunity for GROW with SAP

Join this webinar to discover how SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP) for Supply Chain enhances the GROW with SAP offering, now featuring standard integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Topics include an overview of SAP IBP, its alignment with GROW, positioning strategies, and pricing details—ideal for partners aiming to expand their portfolios by adding SAP IBP for Supply Chain.

        Register

 

  • Session 1: 14th November 2024, 4:00 PM - 4:30 PM Europe/Berlin

 

 

 

 

Webinar: GROW with SAP in FSI

Join SAP's Falk Rieker, Global Head of Financial Services, and Stuart Grant, Head of Capital Markets, Asset and Wealth Management, as they explore SAP's offerings for Financial Services Institutions (FSI) with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This session will cover SAP's FSI strategy, opportunities in the APAC region, positioning GROW with SAP for FSI, and replicable success stories. Learn how GROW with SAP, along with our industry-leading solutions, can help fast-growing FSI organizations streamline operations and ensure long-term success.

 

        Register

 

  • Session 1: 14th November 2024, 2:00 PM - 3:00 PM Asia/Singapore

 

 

 

Webinar: Make the most of SAP support – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Hot Topic Series

Join SAP S/4HANA Cloud experts for a 60-minute session on maximizing SAP Support. Learn about 24/7 support channels like the Customer Interaction Center, SAP Help, and SAP Community, designed to assist with customer queries. Perfect for consultants, experts, and project managers in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects. 

        Register

  • Session 1: November 11th – 7:30 AM to 8:30 AM CET (English)
  • Session 2: November 12th – 4:00 AM to 5:00 AM CET (Chinese)
  • Session 3: November 13th – 3:30 AM to 4:30 AM CET (Japanese)
  • Session 4: November 14th – 12:00 PM to 1:00 PM CET (English)
  • Session 5: November 15th – 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM CET (Spanish)
  • Session 6: November 15th – 5:00 PM to 6:00 PM CET (English)

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Webinar: Q4 2024 GROW with SAP global partner update

Join us for the Q4 2024 global webcast on GROW with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, where we’ll discuss updates on SAP Global Trade Management, industry-specific developments, cross- and up-sell opportunities, localization, and partner growth options.

      Register

  • Session 1: 21st November 2024, 8:30 AM - 10:30 AM Europe/Berlin
  • Session 2: 21st November 2024, 4:30 PM - 6:30 PM Europe/Berlin

 

 

 

Webinar: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation essentials – SAP Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management

Join us for the Implementation Essentials event on SAP Enterprise Portfolio and Project Management, designed for partner project teams involved in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementations. This 2-day session, lasting 2.5 hours each day, will provide essential insights and support for successful project execution.

      Register

  • Session 1: 21st November 2024, 9:00 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
  • Session 2: 22nd November 2024, 9:00 AM - 11:30 AM Europe/Amsterdam
 

 

In-Depth With SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition Series – Collection

 

 

The In-Depth with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition program offers deep-dive sessions to help customers and partners maximize the value of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. These sessions provide expert insights into the solution's features, functions, and the business benefits of its latest innovations.

       

       Recording

 

 

 

Transformation with S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

Overview

    Register/Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Asset Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408

Join Gerhard Welker for an insightful video on the latest innovations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408, focusing on asset management. Key highlights include enhanced recording of the "As-Found" condition, mass change custom fields for maintenance plans, and a new filter for maintenance requests. Discover how these updates can improve your asset management processes and boost efficiency. 

        Watch

 

 

Asset Revaluation & Acquisition in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via SAP Build Process Automation 

Discover how SAP Build Process Automation is transforming asset revaluation and acquisition for finance teams in this blog by Hardeep Tulsi. Learn how seamless automation, low-code solutions, and AI-powered precision are improving accuracy and efficiency in asset management for a Professional Services company. Automate workflows effortlessly, extract data from documents, and reduce manual revaluation errors.

 

        Access

 

 

Localization and Identity & Access Management (IAM) with SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2408

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 release introduces powerful updates for global operations and identity management. Key features include new public sector localizations for Germany, Canada, and Australia, expanded versions for countries like Chile and Japan, enhanced IAM documentation for smooth user access, and automation tools for compliance. These updates simplify tax compliance, e-invoicing, and reporting while ensuring smooth user and role management across regions.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

Release Assessment and Scope Dependency for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition : Partner TDD Systems

We’re excited to announce that the latest version of the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency tool now includes Partner TDD systems (Customizing 100) for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This update addresses partner requests and ensures seamless upgrades with no Day 1 impact.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

 

Foundational Elements for Harnessing the Power of Business AI in Your SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Ed.

Discover how to elevate your team's productivity and optimize business processes with AI in Marco Valencia's latest blog post. Learn about user empowerment through AI-driven UX, seamless integration with SAP Start, and the latest AI-enhanced best practices for material planning and sales order management.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

       
        

Partner Delivery Groups

Overview

Register/Access

 

 

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

This group focuses on providing enhanced learnings and periodic updates to the partner community with respect to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition product. Our goal is to facilitate collaboration with your peers and SAP subject matter experts.

 

       Access

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

 

This private group is focused solely on helping you make your SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition projects successful. We are dedicated to your success and work to quickly scale the latest SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition product knowledge, and solution lifecycle experiences out to the wider community. We welcome your questions and feedback here and look forward to your active participation.

 

       Access

SAP Business Technology Platform

Get up to speed with the latest content and activities in the SAP BTP Partner Group. Don’t miss out the upcoming SAP BTP Partner Community Call on September 20th. Get all the details, save your seat today and share with your network

       Access

 

SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network

In the SAP Ariba and Business Network Delivery Group, we excited to share that we are welcoming our Test, Demonstration & Development Program team, led by Prasanth Rajan, to the SAP Ariba and SAP Business Network Partner Delivery Group. This collaboration has allowed us to invite over 300 partner consultants who participate in the Test, Demonstration & Development Program. This initiative is key to enhancing our partner experiences and fostering stronger collaboration.

 

We are extending open invitations to our ISBN partners to ask their how-to questions, with a view to generate constructive and continuous learning in a growing partner group within SAP Community.

 

 

       Access

SAP SuccessFactors HXM

SAP SuccessFactors is delivering value across multiple types of Artificial Intelligence (AI).

  • Generative AI: Accelerate HR processes and tasks by quickly generating or summarizing text across the SAP SuccessFactors HXM suite.
  • Conversational AI: Deliver a better employee experience while lowering personnel costs with a natural language processing chatbot.
  • Automation: Lower personnel costs while increasing data accuracy and accelerating repetitive core HR processes.
  • Deep Learning AI: Transform talent development and employee experience with personalized recommendations and deep insights.

 

        Access

SAP Customer Experience & CRM

On regular cadences, we partner with internal Customer Experience & CRM subject matter experts to share best practices, new product information and thought leadership through delivery blogs in our partner delivery group. Our blogs are amplified through targeted communications and social media to help encourage engagement amongst partners and internal subject matter experts. Internal subject matter experts are always welcome to contribute blogs amongst any of our other solution partner delivery groups as well.

 

        Access

 

 

 

 

Copyright/Trademark  |  Privacy  |  Impressum

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content: But In Other QAS Server I Had Maintained Parameter to Test Only 1 Acounting Document and 1 Material Ledger was Generated , Even with Price Change

entry.title: Communication arrangement SAP_COM_0301
entry.content: We are implementing an S/4Hana System in the public cloud and would like to replicate employees from an external system using the API. We have now found that by activating SAP_COM_0301 it is possible to maintain contingent workers in the public cloud. However, these should not be maintained in the external HR system, as there is no customer master data available, which is mandatory for contingent workers when it is created in the public cloud. Is there a solution for this?

entry.title: Re: Multiple Royalty Recipients in Condition Contract in...
entry.content: Thank you Andreas. so we create different condition contract for each co-authors. Also, I have created custom defined partner functions to accommodate all the co-authors in the sales order since sales order accepts one royalty recipient (RR). Custom partners were copied and created from the default (RR) and I can now add all co-authors in the sales order . The issue is that only the default RR is recognized when royalties is processed. In the public cloud, how can resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Can we deploy sapui5 web components app onto S/4 HANA...
entry.content:
Is this what you are looking for?

https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/abap-deploy

entry.title: Re: Settlement management rebates
entry.content:
Hi @kirankumardara, 

You can refer to the SAP standard configuration guide in KBA 2535889 for further details:
https://me.sap.com/notes/2535889/E

Regarding your issue, there could be a few potential causes. I’d recommend checking the following:

  • Condition Contract Types Configuration:
    Navigate to Condition Contract Management > Condition Contract Maintenance > Define Condition Contract Types. Ensure the contract types you intend to use are set to "Not Blocked - Can be Used."

  • User Role Access:
    Verify with your Security team if there are any role-based restrictions limiting access to specific contract types.

 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: Compatibility Scope: What Happens after 2025/2030
entry.content: Great block and valuable information

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting: Ordering a Credit Product from an External Credit Agency
entry.content:
Hello @Christina_WS , thanks for the blog Post. 
I have a quick question, and i hope you can help me. I want to order a Monitoring Product, but the Button to switch on "New Monitoring Order" cant be selected and is grey in the "Order Product" Tab. 
I checked, the Product is active and i also assigned it in the "Map Products to Rating Procedures" as Monitoring Product for Mass Activation. Can you tell me, why i cant select the Monitoring?

entry.title: Re: Settlement management rebates
entry.content: Hi Victor, Thanks for the response. The configuration you have suggested is already there in state "Not blocked-can be user". I'm attaching the screenshot for your perusal. @gvictor

entry.title: Re: Discount Name Field missing from Payment Terms
entry.content: hi thanks for the response, i the localization is set up to Mexico also i have check the UI part and click "restore the default" and the field does not appear what it could be?

entry.title: Upcoming Expert Deep Dive Live Sessions for Scripting Support , (Cloud) Hotfolders and Interceptors
entry.content:
I am excited to announce that I will be conducting live training sessions next week on the 26th,27th and 28th of November. The sessions will cover important topics in the field of Commerce Domain.

The first session will cover the topic of Scripting Support in SAP Commerce Cloud. This 2-hour session will provide an overview of scripting support and how to apply scripts in various aspects of SAP Commerce Cloud such as ImpEx, Cronjobs, Event handling, Task engine, and dynamic Business Process management.

Registration link :Identifying Scripting Support in SAP Commerce Cloud

The second session will focus on Understanding Hot Folders and Cloud Hot Folders in SAP Commerce Cloud. This 1-hour session will cover the implementation, configuration, and customization of the “Hot Folders” functionality, as well as provide an overview of “Cloud Hot Folders” and its architecture, processing flow, and configuration with SAP Commerce Cloud.

Registration link: Understanding Hot Folders and Cloud Hot Folders in SAP Commerce Cloud 

Lastly, the third session will introduce Interceptors in SAP Commerce Cloud. This 1-hour session will cover the concept of interceptors, different interceptor types, how to implement a new interceptor, and best practices for implementation. The session will end with a practical exercise demonstrating the steps of implementing a new interceptor and testing it on the SAP Commerce Cloud Storefront.

Registration link: Introducing Interceptors in SAP Commerce Cloud 

I look forward to welcoming eager learners to these live sessions. Happy Learning!

entry.title: GR Valuation for foreign currencies and GR Cancelation differencies (BSX transaction differencies)
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I found an interesting example of Goods Receipt Valuation for Purchase Orders when involving foreign currencies and Cancelation of the same GR. In particular for the BSX transaction.
All the below calculation and SAP logic is working as described here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/erpscm/3362168405.html

The scenario is the following.
Our local currency is USD, material has a standard price of 0,01 USD per 1 PC.
We create a PO in EUR for 100 000 PCs. Or exchange rate is 1,07049.

We post a GR with mvmt type 101.
BSX account is among the accounts which gets hit with value of 1000 EUR to 1000 USD.
This is calculated in the following way:
For local currency in USD BSX = 100 000PC*0,01USD/1PC = 1000.
For PO currency in EUR:
First we need to convert the standard local price per PC according the exchange rate in the PO - USD to EUR = 0,01/ 1,07049 = 0,009341517.SAP rounds this number to two places after the decimal 0,009341517=0,01EUR.
Now EUR BSX = 100 000PC*0,01USD/1PC = 1000. Exactly the same as is in the local USD.

So far so good. Now we want to cancel this GR posting using mvmt 102 in the same day, immediately after the previous posting.
However, when we do the cancellation and open the FI document we can notice that for BSX transaction EUR is not equal to USD like in the 101 posting.
BSX = 934,15EUR to 1000USD.
And this is due the fact that during the reversal SAP does not round the EUR exchange rate up to the second digit after the decimal but multiplies to the whole value. (100 000PC*0,009341517EUR, instead of 100 000PC *0,01EUR).

Have you noticed this behaviour? Is there a note which is supposed to fix this?
I have already browsed trough several, including https://me.sap.com/notes/191927/E but it rather seems to describe and confirm the above calculation than to fix it.

Will apricate your input.

Best Regards,
Boris

entry.title: Material type for only manage purchase orders
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to create a material only for purchase purpose. This material will be used to group other materials that we have in our company.

Imagine, we have 3 production lines. Our company requires to have separated stocks for each production line, so, today, we have 3 material numbers identifying same physical material. When we create a purchase order, we reference 3 material numbers, but for our vendor all 3 materials are the same.

So, we need to create a material which, once we have purchased, we will receive it and we will split in this 3 internal material codes, depending on their demand. And, I don't know, if it's possible to have all stock summarized to main code.

Thanks a lot.

Regards!!!

entry.title: Re: SAP BPA - Environment Variables
entry.content: A simpler way to do it would be to create a group in the Custom IDP with any users who can approve, and specify this group as the approvers. Whenever you want to change the users you just change the users in the group.

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content:
hi,

it is a function module. I'm getting code inspector error.
This error is a naming conventions warning error within programming conventions. Message code LOCDAT .

I get invalid name error for line 8.
I need to fix it.

entry.title: Re: Import Sales Orders (Part 9): Creation with Reference
entry.content: Can this be done in the On prem version too? Or is this only available for Cloud.

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content: Thanks Bernhard, we found that the Web Application Designer is indeed installed however there was no shortcut created for it in the startmenu. After creating the shortcut manually we were able to start and use the Web Application Designer.

entry.title: How to visualize only the item "Cal. Year, 4 Special Periods" in Group Data Analysis?
entry.content:
In the FIORI app Group Data Analysis, if I try to filter using the dimension Fiscal Year the system shows all the possible fiscal year variants even if the version is set as "K4 Cal. Year, 4 Special Periods" (see the attachments)

Does exist a setting that make possible to visualize only "K4 Cal. Year, 4 Special Periods" periods?

Thanks

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Write and Preprocessin...
entry.content:
Hi Rushi,

it always depends on the specific archiving object, but usually it's two different programs. The preprocessing is checking archivability and sets flags that marks the data as "archivable" and the write programm is creating the archive file.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: atc error-invalid name ENQUEUE_PROCESSED for DATA/STA...
entry.content: The error means that your system (or quality) administrators have activated an ATC check that enforces specific naming conventions for ABAP identifiers. While SAP delivers the check itself, the configuration, i.e. which identifiers are valid for what kind of data objects, is the responsibility of the local administrators. If such a check is running, this means your organization has a general guideline for the naming of identifiers. Talk to your quality responsibles to find out which it is - from the outside we cannot tell you which naming convention is expected here.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0 vs ABAP Core Devel...

I have found the settings of my proxy, you can see in print screen attached.

Eclipse proxy settings are in: Menu > Window > preferences > Network connections

entry.title: Re: Enriching Readings from MQTT Sensors with the Applicable Manufacturing Context
entry.content:
Hi Frank,

Thanks for sharing the information on MQTT. 

For our OPC UA communication we have a API in Production process design to write the value to the tag, do we have such option with MQTT interface ? If i need to send some value to MQTT topic on ad-hoc basis via Production process, is it possible ? 

Regards,

Vishal

entry.title: Stocktransfer from neutral stock to orders on hand with EWM
entry.content:
Hello,

In our project, we implemented a scenario where we produce neutral material on stock and pick it later for delivery.
Now we want to move this stock into stock type "orders on hand" to reserve it for a special customer.

After analyzing the system, we found the app "manage Stock" that allows to create but not move stock into orders on hand.
Furthermore, we use EWM for stock movement.
Old goods movement methods in migo don't work or are not applicable.

Is this possible in Public Cloud?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Stocktransfer from neutral stock to orders on hand wi...
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the ‘Orders on Hand’ stock type is typically used for sales order stock, which is created when a sales order is issued, not through a manual stock transfer. For your scenario, you might consider using the ‘Reserve for Other Users’ functionality in the ‘Manage Stock’ app. This allows you to reserve specific stock for a particular purpose, similar to what you’re trying to achieve with the ‘Orders on Hand’ stock type. However, this doesn’t move the stock to a different stock type, but rather flags it as reserved within its current stock type.

As for the Warehouse Management (EWM) aspect, EWM is fully integrated and any stock movements or changes made in the Inventory Management apps should be reflected in EWM. However, specific EWM functionalities like creating Warehouse Tasks for the stock transfer would need to be handled in EWM-specific apps like ‘Create Warehouse Tasks’.

Best regards,
SAP Support.

entry.title: Sap Business One problem when run addon in SAP MDI
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to run addon in SAP MDI like : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uez_a1x0B0g

Here is my code

public void MENU_PRESSED(ref MenuEvent pVal, out bool BubbleEvent)
        {
            BubbleEvent = true;
            if (pVal.MenuUID == QCOrderList & pVal.BeforeAction == true)
            {
                var t = new System.Threading.Thread((start) =>
                {
                    var form = new Forms.TFQMS_QCOrderList();

                    var hWnd = WinAPI.FindWindowA("TMFrameClass", null);
                    var hChild = WinAPI.GetWindow(hWnd, GetWindowType.GW_CHILD);
                    StringBuilder ls_ClassName;
                    StringBuilder ls_WindowName;

                    while (hChild != IntPtr.Zero)
                    {
                        ls_ClassName = new StringBuilder(1255);
                        ls_WindowName = new StringBuilder(1255);

                        WinAPI.GetClassNameW(hChild, ls_ClassName, 1255);
                        WinAPI.GetWindowTextW(hChild, ls_WindowName, 1255);

                        if (ls_ClassName.ToString() == "TMMDIClientClass" && WinAPI.IsWindowVisible(hChild))
                        {
                            break;
                        }
                        else
                        {
                            hChild = WinAPI.GetWindow(hChild, GetWindowType.GW_HWNDNEXT);
                        }
                    }

                    WinAPI.SetParent(form.Handle, hChild);

                    IntPtr style = WinAPI.GetWindowLongPtr(form.Handle, GWL_Flags.GWL_STYLE);

                    form.Visible = true;
                    form.ControlBox = true;
                    form.Show();
                    form.Activate();
                    form.Focus();

                    System.Windows.Forms.Application.EnableVisualStyles();
                    System.Windows.Forms.Application.Run(form);

                });
                t.SetApartmentState(ApartmentState.STA);
                t.Start();
            }

            
        }

But I have some problems about drag sap business one windows.

Please help me.

Thanks in advance.

Tuan

entry.title: Re: How does IAS System handle the Multiple Employment issue of same Employee ?
entry.content: Hey,

entry.title: Re: How does IAS System handle the Multiple Employment issue of same Employee ?
entry.content: Hey, usually only one of the employments is active right? Or are they both active at the same time? If they where both active at the same time than you would need to guarantee that the username is unique and ideally the user would have 2 separate email accounts too.

entry.title: Re: Troubleshooting: Ordering a Credit Product from an External Credit Agency
entry.content:
Hi @markusl1,

it is very likely that you have selected a product for which no dependent monitoring product was added.

  1. Open the Configure Credit Agencies and Products app. 
  2. Navigate into the entry of the main product that you want to order. 
  3. Add the monitoring product in the Dependent Products section.

This makes the monitoring product available for selection when you order a product.

Here's an example with screenshots:

Thanks for your feedback, I'll improve the documentation with this information.

Best wishes
Christina

entry.title: Create Routing by referencing sales order and line items
entry.content:
Hi All,

We need to create routing by referencing sales order and line items through a BAPI. 

Could you please help me to find suitable BAPI or alternative method.

 

Thank you

Buddika

entry.title: Re: Scripting Tracker - Decoupling the Recorder to use it in Other Contexts
entry.content:
Hello @Girish2000,

nope, but you can DIY, you can find an approach here: Loop through SAPGUI ... It is VBA, but it bases on SAP GUI Scripting so it shouldn't be difficult to make an adaptation.

Best regards
Stefan

entry.title: Navigation and routing in SAP BusinessOne UI API extension app web client
entry.content:
Hi,
I am developing a SAP BusinessOne UI API extension for web SAP B1 webclient.I have two UDO views in this app.The requirement is on a button click from UDO1 view , need to navigate to the UDO2 view.From there we need to select some data from the UDO2 view and navigate back to UDO1 view.In the UI API extension documentation, the method available is
"await oEnv.open("/webx/index.html#webclient-ORDR&/Objects/ORDR/List");"
But this will open the url as an external link.
Is is possible to implement the navigation to other views just like SAPUI5 apps in SAP B1 UI API extensions?

Any documentation is available for the routing and navigation between pages in SAP Business One web client?

Thanks,

Deepesh

entry.title: Re: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems – SAP Watch List Screening for Simplified Due Diligence and Compliance
entry.content:
Hello @pj14

Thank you for your question.

We have integrated the existing documents on the basis of customer requirements and requirements from the integrating applications.
If you would like other document types to be integrated, you will need to contact the corresponding process owners (e.g., customer returns) and ask them to integrate with SAP International Trade (including SAP Watch List Screening). 

Best regards,
Valentin

entry.title: Re: Build and Run Multi-Tenant SaaS Solutions on the SAP BTP
entry.content:
Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager” replaces the “Author Readings”-app

We deprecated and archived the SME Partner Reference Application “Author Readings” and replaced it with its successor, the Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager”.

The new Partner Reference Application comes with a new developer journey to make it easier to get started and quickly build a scalable, multi-tenant application.

In a nutshell the new journey starts with building the business core of the application focusing on entity models and business logic.
The second step “Make it scale” focuses on multitenancy enablement and the tenant lifecycle of customer subscriptions.
After having the deployment and management of multi-tenant applications up and running, the third step adds the integration with ERP solutions – you can start with the ERP backend of your choice.
Finally, the journey adds features and BTP services to the multi-tenant application.  

Developer journey following the partner reference example

Key highlights beyond this redesign of the developer journey:

  • Refactored ERP-agnostic design with integrations to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, SAP Business One and SAP Business ByDesign.
  • Bill of materials details with BTP services used and quantities required based on a sample sizing as a basis for cost calculations.
  • Simplified multi-tenancy configuration.
  • Second web app to manage poetry slam visitors to explain the navigation between web apps.
  • SAP Cloud Logging service for observability.

entry.title: Re: Build and Run Multi-Tenant SaaS Solutions on the SAP BTP
entry.content:
Update October 2024

With the latest update of the Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager” we added a bunch of new capabilities and BTP services:

  • Create and print PDF documents using the SAP Forms Service by Adobe and the SAP Print Service.
  • Connect an email server and send formatted emails.
  • Tutorial on SAP HANA Cloud Tools with details on how to estimate the required size of the SAP HANA Cloud database.
  • Upgrade to the latest CDS version 8 including a simplified subscription handling and multi-tenancy configuration using CDS version 8 capabilities.
  • Expanded explanation of the SAP Custom Domain Service and its usage in multi-tenant applications.
  • Description of how to unsubscribe service broker instances.
  • Creation of test data by a user action instead of csv-files.

entry.title: Re: Transport the Initial Business Configuration Content...

entry.title: Fehler beim Aufruf des SuccessFactors Learning Moduls - Blocked by CORS policy
entry.content:
Beim Aufruf der E-Learning Einheiten im Learning Modul kommt die Fehlermeldung hoch:

Access to XMLHttpREquest at ' landOnPortalHome.do:1 https://.....cloud.sap/.. 'from origin' https://....' has been blocked by CORS policy: No ' Access-Control-Allow-Origin' header is prenset on the requested resource.

dann die Fehlermeldung GET https:// .....net: : ERR_FAILED 404 (Not Found)

Er springt von der Basis Domain  https://hcm...auf die sf Domain https://xyz...

Hat jemand hier eine Lösungsvorschlag, vielen Dank

MfG

entry.title: Source list: valid date
entry.content:
Hi 

I have a source list already created with a contract assigned but with validity in the past. The contract also finished. I creat a new contract for the same supplier, plant, material etc. Then i try to update the source list not trough the contract, directly in ME01. When I create the new register, the system display the following message:

"Valid until" date must not be in the past"

Why I have to update the old register to a date in the present, if it is no more valid, and im adding a new register from now on. What is the best practice related to the source list update?

Thanks for the help.

entry.title: How to get Manager hierarchy in API pull
entry.content:
Hi, I am pulling data into a data lake through the API and am wondering if anyone knows how to get Person's manager, Manager +1, Manager +2, Manager +3, etc. in the same api pull? 

Could i do the lookup manager's manager etc all the way 10 levels away, yes. BUT I fear when I'm trying to see the hierarchy as of the employees term date it wont give me 100% correct results. Right? A manager could be in Sales and had 10 terms mid month and then by month end they moved to Finance and if we apply the month end hierarchy those 10 terms will show up in finance if we use the hierarchy when they should show up in sales. Right?

Anyways.... making the API work for me instead of a million calculations in the lake. 

I want to have the bottom option where i can see Manager +1, +2, etc. to make a hierarchy where the CEO will be level 1, level 2 will be his direct reports. etc. 

Obviously story reports are different but this is how I was able to get it to work in story reports

Soma

Martina_J

entry.title: Correction of Uploaded Sales Data
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are reaching out to you because we are experiencing an issue with some sales data that we manually uploaded to the system. Upon reviewing the uploaded file, we found errors in many of the sales entries, and we need to correct these and re-upload the data after making these corrections.

Could you please let us know how we can make these corrections and overwrite the already uploaded sales data? Is there a way to do this on our end? This is critical for us, as we currently have sales records with incorrect data. Could you please provide the steps we should follow to make these corrections?

Thank you in advance for your help.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Correction of Uploaded Sales Data
entry.content:
According to the explanation provided at the SAP Emarsys Help document below, the best option to clean up incorrect sales data is to perform a smart insight reload:

  • SAP Emarsys Help: Reloading data into Smart Insight

entry.title: Open Hub added fields avoid data reload
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've added a few non-key fields to my OpenHub definition (BW 7.5). When I transported these changes to our QAS system, it returned with error code 8 saying "Error during creation of DDIC sources of Open Hub Destination ZF3HMYOH" and "Database table /BIC/OHZF3HMYOH contains data and cannot be deleted".

So my question: Is there no way around deleting all the content in the destination table (and the requests in BW)?

P.S. OpenHub is set to semantic key with "Keep data and overwrite data sets". Remote connection is an Oracle Database via DBCON.

Thanks
David

For some reason, this stopped working (even though in the target I can see the data). It shows no data at all. Anybody experienced the same issue? My BW roles didn't change.

Thanks
David

entry.content:
@Riyaz_abdul After completing step#3, you should be able to access your MDK web app. Did you see Process finished message in the terminal console?

entry.title: Re: ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0 vs ABAP Core Devel...
entry.content:
Hi Ign,

what I can tell you is the trial instance itself is accessible. If you are using your company network to connect to the instance please ask your IT colleagues for help to get the right proxy settings. Maybe you can try a different network e.g. your local one at home (I assume you are not using a proxy there), to see if you run into the same issue.

It is hard to offer full support here. So maybe you can open a customer ticket to support you further.

best regards, Ingo

entry.title: Issue with MD04 - empty MRP element type Column
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, 

Greetings for the day. We are facing the following issue with a customer. recently we noted for few materials in MD04 the MRP element type column in empty. The Plant is US50 and when we activate the vendor view in MD04, it shows US50 Business Partner and also the Storage location as R01. 

The issue now is that due to these entries, they are considered as receipts and MRP calculations are getting off values. 

The traces of these entries are not anywhere, we checked all the sales orders tables, POs, Production orders etc. and we did not find these items at any level.

Shown below for couple of materials:

 

Cross plant view also for reference. 

it would be of great help if there is any solution for this . 

Thanks in advance. 

Best Regards

Manickath.

@Caetano , @RBrahmankar  please help.

entry.title: Integrating SAP Concur API with SAP SuccessFactors for Automated User Onboarding
entry.content:
Prerequisites

  1. Access to SAP Concur with Admin privileges.
  2. Access to SAP SuccessFactors with Admin privileges.
  3. Access to a development environment with ability to send HTTPS requests (such as Postman or cURL).
  4. Basic understanding of REST APIs and JSON data format.

Authentication

SAP Concur

  1. Generate an API access token:
    • Go to the SAP Concur Admin portal.
    • Navigate to the 'Integrations' or 'APIs' section.
    • Create a new app or use an existing one to get the client ID and client secret.
    • Use these credentials to obtain an OAuth2 accessToken by posting to the /oauth2/v0/token endpoint.

SAP SuccessFactors

  1. Generate an API access token:
    • Log in to SAP SuccessFactors.
    • Go to Admin Center > Manage OAuth2 Client Applications.
    • Create a new OAuth Client providing necessary callback URLs and scopes.
    • Record the client ID and client secret.
    • Use these credentials to obtain an OAuth2 accessToken by sending a POST request to SuccessFactors OAuth token endpoint.

Steps for Integration

Step 1: Extract User Data from SAP SuccessFactors

  1. Make an authorized GET request to the SAP SuccessFactors API endpoint that retrieves user data. Typically, this might look like:
  1. GET /odata/v2/User('userId')

Authorization: Bearer <SuccessFactors access token>

  1. Parse the JSON response to extract necessary user data fields such as FirstName, LastName, Email, etc.

Step 2: Format Data for SAP Concur

  1. Map the extracted user data from SAP SuccessFactors to the corresponding fields expected by the SAP Concur User Profile API.

Step 3: Create User Profile in SAP Concur

1. Construct a JSON payload with the user data formatted for SAP Concur. Example:

 

{
 "User": {
    "LoginID": "<Email>",
    "FirstName": "<FirstName>",
    "LastName": "<LastName>",
    // Include other necessary fields as per the API specification  }
}

2. Make a POST request to the SAP Concur API endpoint (/api/v3.0/profile/users) to create a new user profile:

 

POST /api/v3.0/profile/users
Content-Type: application/json
Authorization: Bearer <Concur access token>
Body: <JSON payload from the previous step>

Check the response:

    • If successful, the API will return a 200 OK status with details of the created user profile.
    • If there are errors (e.g., missing required fields, authentication issues), the API will return an error status code and message. Handle these appropriately (e.g., log errors, retry with corrected data).

Step 4: Error Handling and Logging

  1. Implement error handling to manage failed API requests or unexpected responses.
  2. Log important events and errors to facilitate troubleshooting and auditing of the integration process.

Step 5: Testing and Validation

  1. Perform unit and integration tests to ensure that the integration works as expected under different scenarios.
  2. Validate that new user data in SAP SuccessFactors correctly creates corresponding profiles in SAP Concur without data inconsistency.

entry.title: Re: MTA Apps uses cp.portal
entry.content:
I needed to use an absolute URI, one that uses the work zone prefix composed of the cloud service ID and app ID.
The cloud service ID is field sap.cloud.service in webapp/manifest.json and the app ID is field sap.app.id.
The workzone proxy path is those 2 fields (with all non-alpha characters removed) concatenated with a dot in between
ex: sap.cloud.service = nasa
sap.app.id = rocket.engine.display
proxy path = /nasa.rocketenginedisplay/..
I noticed that the proxy prefix is interestingly starting with a serial number for instance: /a9d98d7c-09a6-42a9-aba8-36f935f378a8.nasa.rocketenginedisplay/
How did i get the proxy prefix? Try the following in your terminal when debugging on workzone, it may help:
this.getMetadata().getManifest["sap.app"].id;
^That command is to confirm your sap.app id (just in case)...
Then follow up with:
jQuery.sap.getModulePath('your_sap_app_id')
This should give you the proxy prefix.

entry.title: Re: SES has been revoked, 102 doc generated but accepeted status not changed
entry.content: Is there a soluction appling a note or running some program ??? I have exactly the same trouble... Tanks !!!

entry.title: Re: HCM Brasil - eSocial S-1.3 - Entrega final

Bom dia,

Para visualizar você precisa pedir acesso ao nosso workzone (https://url.sap/04gul6). Não esqueça de colocar o seu email corporativo.

Abraço,

Anderson

entry.title: Re: Creating Custom Data Collection Object in Onboarding 2.0
entry.content:
Hi all,

I've done all steps for one example and worked all OK

when I wanted to replicate with another case, in step 2) I've got the following message, although I made it the same way 2 tests.The Second Step is Associating the Custom Objects to the UserConfig Object

The associations cust_Prueba and cust_onb_attached are working OK. But the last one, cust_Chile has a problem when I try to Save the object

The associations cust_Prueba and cust_onb_attached are working OK. But the last one, cust_Chile has a problem when I try to Save the object

Here, is how I defined this association

 

 

 

Seems that the Source Object column and/or Destination Object Column are not configurated or misconfigurating. But they are the same as the first 2 associations that work OK.

Maybe you can help me in finding why I have this behavior.

Best Regards,

Emi

entry.title: Reimport software collection
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We would like to know if it's possible to reimport a Software Collection in QAS system ?



Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Reimport software collection
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

It's not possible to "re-import" a collection that was already imported.

In this case, you will need to export the Software Collection again from Dev System and Import the new version (even though there are no changes) in the QAS System.

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In Process
entry.content:
Dear All,

Documents marked as Irrelevant are still shown in "In Process" status. Is it correct?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In...
entry.content:
Dear All,

When a document is marked as Irrelevant, it does not mean that it is canceled, but that it is marked as Irrelevant for Accounting. If you filter with 'Unposted Source Documents', the document will no more appear. The Relevance Status appears as Irrelevant and the Processing Status stays as In Process.

It is the expected system behavior.

Refer to the KBA 2925134 - Irrelevant Source Document with Processing Status In Process https://me.sap.com/notes/2925134 for additional details, please.

Thank you.

Regards,
Anderson
SAP Support

entry.title: Setting the metapath in an xml fragment only for the children of the object currently displayed
entry.content:
Dear community,

I have the following UI scenario: A RAP-based OData service is consumed by a Fiori elements generated list report. The user can click on a line in the list report to open an object page. In the object page a table with all children of the specific object is displayed. This all works well with some Fiori elements annotations.

I need, however, to add some other functionalities to the table displaying the children in the object page. I was considering using a custom section in which I wanted to use the FPE table macro. My question know is whether it is possible to set the metapath property of the macro so that only the children of the requested parent objects are displayed. Something like:

<macros:Table xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros" metaPath="/CurrentParentEntity/_ChildEntity"/>

Is this possible with the macro?

If not: Is this possible with a UI5 table by setting the context path accordingly?

Thanks for your help!
